summary: ANDROID 🟥 | CCL | CCL during call is blinking for blocking settings
scenario: Locked CCL settings blink during an active call instead of remaining stable
description_clean: During a call, CCL settings that should be locked are blinking instead.
steps: Access the CCL (Call Control Lock) settings during the call.
Observe the behavior of the CCL settings that are supposed to be locked.
expected: The CCL settings that are locked should remain static and not blink.
actual: The CCL settings that are locked are blinking instead of remaining static.
